_comment: Orthanc runtime config for on-premise installs. TLS for modality-side DICOM is enabled — ultrasound machines must trust the clinic CA. The remote-AET allowlist guards against rogue modalities on the LAN.
Name: klinika-orthanc

DicomModalities._comment: Populate per-clinic during onboarding. Each ultrasound modality must be allowlisted by AET. Example: "ge-versana": ["VERSANA1", "192.168.1.50", 104, "GenericTLS"]
